title: LGBTQ2+ Helplines * LGBTQ2+ Youth - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Crisis Hotlines > LGBTQ2+ Helplines * LGBTQ2+ Youth 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter LGBTQ2+ Youth Older Adults Transgender Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL AND TRANSGENDER NATIONAL HELP CENTER LGBT NATIONAL YOUTH TALKLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides telephone, online private one-to-one chat, and email peer support for LGBT teens and young adults to talk about coming-out issues, relationship concerns, parent issues, school problems, HIV/AIDS anxiety, safer-sex information, etc. 2261 Market Street #296 San Francisco, CA 94114 Eligibility: Ages 13-25 who identify as gay, lesbian, bisexual, and transgender Hours: Monday-Friday 11am-8pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (800) 246-7743 800-246 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE TREVOR PROJECT TREVOR PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides crisis intervention, suicide prevention services, peer support, and outside referrals relating to sexual orientation or gender identity issues. Eligibility: Ages 13-24 who identify as lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer, or questioning Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (866) 488-7386 24 7 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
